patch:
Index: .github/workflows/OC.yml
===================================================================
--- .github/workflows/OC.yml	
+++ .github/workflows/OC.yml	
@@ -1,421 +1,421 @@
 name: OpenCode Task
 
 on:
   workflow_dispatch:
     inputs:
       prompt:
         description: "Task prompt for opencode"
         required: true
         type: string
 
       model:
         description: "Model (provider/model format)"
         required: false
         type: choice
         default: "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5"
         options:
           - anthropic/claude-opus-4-5
           - anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5
           - anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5
           - openai/gpt-4o
           - openai/gpt-4o-mini
           - google/gemini-2.0-flash
           - opencode/big-pickle
           - opencode/deepseek-v4-flash-free
           - opencode/minimax-m2.5-free
           - opencode/nemotron-3-super-free
           - opencode/qwen3.6-plus-free
 
       variant:
         description: "Model variant / reasoning effort (high | max | minimal — leave blank for default)"
         required: false
         type: string
         default: ""
 
       thinking:
         description: "Show thinking blocks (where supported)"
         required: false
         type: boolean
         default: false
 
       session_id:
         description: "Continue an existing session by ID (leave blank to start fresh)"
         required: false
         type: string
         default: ""
 
       fork_session:
         description: "Fork the session before continuing (only applies when session_id is set)"
         required: false
         type: boolean
         default: false
 
       share_session:
         description: "Publish the session to opencode.ai/s/… when done"
         required: false
         type: boolean
         default: false
 
       session_branch:
         description: "Branch to commit sessions to (created as orphan if missing)"
         required: false
         type: string
         default: "opencode-sessions"
 
       commit_changes:
         description: "Commit code changes back to the triggering branch"
         required: false
         type: boolean
         default: true
 
       working_directory:
         description: "Working directory inside the repo (default: repo root)"
         required: false
         type: string
         default: "."
 
       dotnet_version:
         description: ".NET SDK version to install (e.g. 9.0.x)"
         required: false
         type: string
         default: "9.0.x"
 
 permissions:
   contents: write
 
 jobs:
   run-opencode:
     # Windows runner: ships VS 2022, MSBuild, Windows SDK, NuGet, C++ build tools.
     # Git Bash is available for all `shell: bash` steps.
     runs-on: windows-latest
     timeout-minutes: 120
 
     steps:
       # ── Checkout ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       - name: Checkout repository
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           fetch-depth: 0
           token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
 
       # ── Set XDG_DATA_HOME ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       # opencode follows the XDG spec on all platforms: it stores sessions at
       # $XDG_DATA_HOME/opencode. Pinning XDG_DATA_HOME to RUNNER_TEMP gives us
       # a known, writable path that works on both Linux and Windows runners.
       - name: Set XDG_DATA_HOME
         shell: bash
         run: echo "XDG_DATA_HOME=$RUNNER_TEMP/xdg-data" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
 
       # ── Git identity ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       - name: Configure git identity
         shell: bash
         run: |
           git config user.name  "github-actions[bot]"
           git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
 
       # ── .NET SDK ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       # windows-latest ships VS 2022, MSBuild, and the Windows SDK — everything
       # WinUI 3 needs at build time. The Windows App SDK itself arrives via NuGet
       # (Microsoft.WindowsAppSDK package), restored automatically by MSBuild.
       # This step just pins the exact .NET SDK version.
       - name: Set up .NET SDK
         uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
         with:
           dotnet-version: ${{ inputs.dotnet_version }}
 
 
       # ── Build caches ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       # NuGet package cache — avoids re-downloading on every run (~5-15 min saved)
       - name: Cache NuGet packages
         uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
           path: ~/.nuget/packages
           key: nuget-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.csproj', '**/packages.lock.json') }}
           restore-keys: |
             nuget-${{ runner.os }}-
 
       # MSBuild incremental output cache — avoids full recompile when only
       # source files changed that opencode touched (~10-20 min saved)
       - name: Cache MSBuild outputs
         uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
           path: |
             **/bin
             **/obj
           key: msbuild-${{ runner.os }}-${{ github.ref_name }}-${{ github.sha }}
           restore-keys: |
             msbuild-${{ runner.os }}-${{ github.ref_name }}-
             msbuild-${{ runner.os }}-
 
       # ── Bun + opencode ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       - name: Set up Bun
         uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
         with:
           bun-version: latest
 
       - name: Install opencode
         shell: bash
         run: bun install -g opencode-ai
 
       - name: Verify opencode installation
         shell: bash
         run: opencode --version
 
       # ── Restore session cache ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
       - name: Restore session cache
         id: session-cache
         uses: actions/cache/restore@v4
         with:
           path: ${{ runner.temp }}/xdg-data/opencode
           key: opencode-data-${{ github.run_id }}
           restore-keys: |
             opencode-data-
 
       # ── Run opencode task ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       - name: Run opencode task
         id: opencode
         shell: bash
         working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
         env:
           ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
           OPENAI_API_KEY:    ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY }}
           GEMINI_API_KEY:    ${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}
           OC_PROMPT:         ${{ inputs.prompt }}
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
 
           ARGS=(
             --model "${{ inputs.model }}"
             --format json
             --dangerously-skip-permissions
             --title "CI run #${{ github.run_number }} (${{ github.ref_name }}) by ${{ github.actor }}"
           )
 
           [ -n "${{ inputs.variant }}" ]    && ARGS+=(--variant "${{ inputs.variant }}")
           [ "${{ inputs.thinking }}"  = "true" ] && ARGS+=(--thinking)
 
           if [ -n "${{ inputs.session_id }}" ]; then
             ARGS+=(--session "${{ inputs.session_id }}")
             [ "${{ inputs.fork_session }}" = "true" ] && ARGS+=(--fork)
           fi
 
           [ "${{ inputs.share_session }}" = "true" ] && ARGS+=(--share)
 
           # Redirect stdout directly to the events file — no pipe.
           # Piping through tee causes OS-level buffering when stdout is not a TTY,
           # so events are generated but never flushed; the file stays empty until
           # the process exits (or is cancelled).
           # Redirecting to a file bypasses that: the kernel writes straight through.
           # Write the prompt to a file so it never becomes a shell argument.
           # Large prompts (JSON, error logs, etc.) exceed the OS ARG_MAX limit
           # when passed on the command line.
           PROMPT_FILE="$RUNNER_TEMP/opencode-prompt.txt"
           printf '%s' "$OC_PROMPT" > "$PROMPT_FILE"
 
           opencode run "${ARGS[@]}" -f "$PROMPT_FILE" -- "Complete the task described in the attached file."             > "$RUNNER_TEMP/opencode-events.jsonl"
           OPENCODE_EXIT=$?
 
           [ "$OPENCODE_EXIT" -eq 0 ] || { echo "opencode exited with $OPENCODE_EXIT"; exit "$OPENCODE_EXIT"; }
 
           # Parse the completed event stream
           jq -r 'select(.type == "text" and .part.type == "text") | .part.text'             "$RUNNER_TEMP/opencode-events.jsonl"             > "$RUNNER_TEMP/opencode-output.txt" 2>/dev/null || true
 
           SESSION_ID=$(jq -r 'select(.sessionID != null) | .sessionID'                          "$RUNNER_TEMP/opencode-events.jsonl" 2>/dev/null | head -1 || true)
           echo "session_id=${SESSION_ID}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
           echo "Opencode session ID: ${SESSION_ID}"
 
           SHARE_URL=$(jq -r 'select(.type == "share") | .part.url // empty'                         "$RUNNER_TEMP/opencode-events.jsonl" 2>/dev/null | head -1 || true)
           echo "share_url=${SHARE_URL}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
           [ -n "$SHARE_URL" ] && echo "Session shared at: $SHARE_URL" || true
 
       # ── Upload artifacts ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       - name: Upload human-readable output
         if: always()
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: opencode-output-${{ github.run_id }}
           path: ${{ runner.temp }}\opencode-output.txt
           retention-days: 90
 
       - name: Upload raw JSON event stream
         if: always()
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: opencode-events-${{ github.run_id }}
           path: ${{ runner.temp }}\opencode-events.jsonl
           retention-days: 90
 
       - name: Upload session data directory
         if: always()
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: opencode-sessions-${{ github.run_id }}
           path: ${{ runner.temp }}/xdg-data/opencode
           retention-days: 90
           if-no-files-found: warn
 
       # ── Save session cache ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       - name: Save session cache
         if: always()
         uses: actions/cache/save@v4
         with:
           path: ${{ runner.temp }}/xdg-data/opencode
           key: opencode-data-${{ github.run_id }}
 
       # ── Persist sessions to a permanent git branch ────────────────────────────
       - name: Persist sessions to git branch
         if: always()
         shell: bash
         env:
           SESSION_BRANCH: ${{ inputs.session_branch }}
           SESSION_ID:     ${{ steps.opencode.outputs.session_id }}
           SHARE_URL:      ${{ steps.opencode.outputs.share_url }}
           OC_PROMPT:      ${{ inputs.prompt }}
           OC_MODEL:       ${{ inputs.model }}
           OC_VARIANT:     ${{ inputs.variant }}
           OC_RUN_URL:     ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
 
           # Use a path under RUNNER_TEMP that works the same in Git Bash and Python
           WORKTREE="$RUNNER_TEMP/session-branch"
           SESSIONS_SRC="$RUNNER_TEMP/xdg-data/opencode"
 
           # Create or fetch the sessions branch as a git worktree
           if git ls-remote --exit-code --heads origin "$SESSION_BRANCH" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
             git fetch origin "$SESSION_BRANCH"
             git worktree add "$WORKTREE" "origin/$SESSION_BRANCH"
             git -C "$WORKTREE" checkout -B "$SESSION_BRANCH"
           else
             git worktree add --orphan -b "$SESSION_BRANCH" "$WORKTREE"
             git -C "$WORKTREE" rm -rf . > /dev/null 2>&1 || true
           fi
 
           # Mirror opencode data dir using Python shutil (rsync not on Windows)
           python3 - <<'PYEOF'
           import os, shutil, pathlib, json, datetime
 
           worktree   = pathlib.Path(os.environ["RUNNER_TEMP"]) / "session-branch"
           source     = pathlib.Path(os.environ["RUNNER_TEMP"]) / "xdg-data" / "opencode"
           data_dest  = worktree / "data"
 
           if source.is_dir() and any(source.iterdir()):
               if data_dest.exists():
                   shutil.rmtree(data_dest)
               shutil.copytree(source, data_dest)
               print("Session data copied.")
           else:
               data_dest.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
               print("No session data to copy.")
 
           manifest = {
               "run_id":     os.environ["GITHUB_RUN_ID"],
               "run_number": os.environ["GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT"],
               "actor":      os.environ["GITHUB_ACTOR"],
               "ref":        os.environ["GITHUB_REF_NAME"],
               "model":      os.environ.get("OC_MODEL", ""),
               "variant":    os.environ.get("OC_VARIANT", ""),
               "session_id": os.environ.get("SESSION_ID", ""),
               "share_url":  os.environ.get("SHARE_URL", ""),
               "timestamp":  datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z"),
               "prompt":     os.environ.get("OC_PROMPT", ""),
               "run_url":    os.environ.get("OC_RUN_URL", ""),
           }
 
           runs_dir = worktree / "runs"
           runs_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
           (runs_dir / f"{os.environ['GITHUB_RUN_ID']}.json").write_text(
               json.dumps(manifest, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8"
           )
           print("Manifest written.")
           PYEOF
 
           cd "$WORKTREE"
           git add -A
 
           if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
             printf 'chore(opencode): session from run #%s\n\nmodel:   %s\nref:     %s\nactor:   %s\nsession: %s\nrun:     %s\n' \
               '${{ github.run_number }}' \
               '${{ inputs.model }}' \
               '${{ github.ref_name }}' \
               '${{ github.actor }}' \
               "${SESSION_ID:-unknown}" \
               '${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}' \
               > "$RUNNER_TEMP/session-commit-msg.txt"
             git commit -F "$RUNNER_TEMP/session-commit-msg.txt"
             git push origin "$SESSION_BRANCH"
           else
             echo "No new session data to persist."
           fi
 
           # Unregister the worktree from git. --force handles open handles.
           # The leftover directory is fine — D:\a\_temp is wiped between runs.
           git worktree remove --force "$WORKTREE" 2>/dev/null || true
 
       # ── Commit code changes back to the source branch ─────────────────────────
       - name: Commit code changes
         if: ${{ inputs.commit_changes }}
         shell: bash
         env:
           OC_PROMPT: ${{ inputs.prompt }}
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
 
           git add -A
           git reset -- .opencode/ 2>/dev/null || true
 
           if git diff --cached --quiet; then
             echo "No code changes to commit."
             exit 0
           fi
 
           printf 'feat(opencode): changes from run #%s\n\nmodel:  %s\nactor:  %s\nrun:    %s\n\nPrompt:\n' \
             '${{ github.run_number }}' \
             '${{ inputs.model }}' \
             '${{ github.actor }}' \
             '${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}' \
             > "$RUNNER_TEMP/commit-msg.txt"
           printf '%s\n' "$OC_PROMPT" >> "$RUNNER_TEMP/commit-msg.txt"
 
-          git commit -F "$RUNNER_TEMP/commit-msg.txt"
+          git commit -F "$RUNNER_TEMP/opencode-output.txt"
           git push origin HEAD:"${{ github.ref_name }}"
 
       # ── Job summary ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       - name: Write job summary
         if: always()
         shell: bash
         env:
           SESSION_ID: ${{ steps.opencode.outputs.session_id }}
           SHARE_URL:  ${{ steps.opencode.outputs.share_url }}
           VARIANT:    ${{ inputs.variant }}
           OC_PROMPT:  ${{ inputs.prompt }}
         run: |
           {
             echo "## OpenCode Task — Run #${{ github.run_number }}"
             echo ""
             echo "| | |"
             echo "|---|---|"
             echo "| **Model** | \`${{ inputs.model }}\` |"
             echo "| **Variant** | \`${VARIANT:-—}\` |"
             echo "| **Session ID** | \`${SESSION_ID:-—}\` |"
             if [ -n "${SHARE_URL:-}" ]; then
               echo "| **Share URL** | [$SHARE_URL]($SHARE_URL) |"
             else
               echo "| **Share URL** | — |"
             fi
             echo "| **Runner** | \`windows-latest\` (VS 2022 + .NET ${{ inputs.dotnet_version }}) |"
             echo "| **Branch** | \`${{ github.ref_name }}\` |"
             echo "| **Sessions branch** | \`${{ inputs.session_branch }}\` |"
             echo "| **Commit changes** | \`${{ inputs.commit_changes }}\` |"
             echo "| **Run** | [${{ github.run_id }}](${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}) |"
             echo ""
             echo "### Prompt"
             echo '```'
             printf '%s\n' "$OC_PROMPT"
             echo '```'
             echo ""
             echo "### Output"
             echo '```'
             cat "$RUNNER_TEMP/opencode-output.txt" 2>/dev/null || echo "(no output captured)"
             echo '```'
           } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

Index: Views/SessionPage.xaml
===================================================================
--- Views/SessionPage.xaml	
+++ Views/SessionPage.xaml	
@@ -1,392 +1,392 @@
 <Page x:Class="JulesClient.Views.SessionsPage"
     x:Name="RootPage"
     xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
     xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
     xmlns:models="using:JulesClient.Models"
     xmlns:vm="using:JulesClient.ViewModels"
     xmlns:converters="using:JulesClient.Services"
     Background="{ThemeResource ApplicationPageBackgroundThemeBrush}">
 
     <Page.Resources>
         <Style x:Key="SessionItemStyle" TargetType="ListViewItem">
             <Setter Property="HorizontalContentAlignment" Value="Stretch"/>
             <Setter Property="Padding" Value="0"/>
             <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2,2,2,2"/>
             <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="6"/>
             <Setter Property="Template">
                 <Setter.Value>
                     <ControlTemplate TargetType="ListViewItem">
                         <ListViewItemPresenter
                             ContentTransitions="{TemplateBinding ContentTransitions}"
                             SelectionCheckMarkVisualEnabled="False"
                             CheckMode="Inline"
                             ContentMargin="{TemplateBinding Padding}"
                             Control.IsTemplateFocusTarget="True"
                             FocusVisualMargin="0"
                             PointerOverBackground="{ThemeResource SystemControlHighlightListLowBrush}"
                             SelectedBackground="{ThemeResource SystemControlHighlightListAccentLowBrush}"
                             SelectedPointerOverBackground="{ThemeResource SystemControlHighlightListAccentMediumBrush}"
                             PressedBackground="{ThemeResource SystemControlHighlightListMediumBrush}"
                             SelectedPressedBackground="{ThemeResource SystemControlHighlightListAccentHighBrush}"
                             CornerRadius="{TemplateBinding CornerRadius}"/>
                     </ControlTemplate>
                 </Setter.Value>
             </Setter>
         </Style>
 
         <converters:OriginatorToAlignmentConverter x:Key="OriginatorToAlignmentConverter"/>
         <converters:OriginatorToColorConverter x:Key="OriginatorToColorConverter"/>
         <converters:Base64ToImageSourceConverter x:Key="Base64ToImageSourceConverter"/>
         <converters:InvertedNullToVisibilityConverter x:Key="InvertedNullToVisibilityConverter"/>
         <converters:NullToVisibilityConverter x:Key="NullToVisibilityConverter"/>
         <converters:CollectionToVisibilityConverter x:Key="CollectionToVisibilityConverter"/>
         <converters:StringToVisibilityConverter x:Key="StringToVisibilityConverter"/>
         <converters:StringToBooleanConverter x:Key="StringToBooleanConverter"/>
         <converters:BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BooleanToVisibilityConverter"/>
         <converters:InvertedBooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="InvertedBooleanToVisibilityConverter"/>
         <converters:DiffLineTypeToColorConverter x:Key="DiffLineTypeToColorConverter"/>
         <converters:DiffLineTypeToForegroundConverter x:Key="DiffLineTypeToForegroundConverter"/>
         <converters:DiffPrefixConverter x:Key="DiffPrefixConverter"/>
 
         <DataTemplate x:Key="ProgressUpdatedTemplate" x:DataType="models:ProgressUpdated">
             <StackPanel Margin="0,1">
                 <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind Title, Mode=OneWay}" FontWeight="Bold" TextWrapping="WrapWholeWords" FontSize="14"
                            Visibility="{x:Bind Title, Converter={StaticResource StringToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
                 <TextBlock converters:MarkdownHelper.Text="{x:Bind Description, Mode=OneWay}"
                            TextWrapping="WrapWholeWords" Opacity="0.9" FontSize="14"
                            Visibility="{x:Bind Description, Converter={StaticResource StringToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
             </StackPanel>
         </DataTemplate>
 
         <DataTemplate x:Key="PlanGeneratedTemplate" x:DataType="models:Plan">
             <StackPanel Margin="0,1">
                 <TextBlock Text="Proposed Plan" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{ThemeResource SystemAccentColor}" FontSize="13" Opacity="0.8"/>
                 <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind Title, Mode=OneWay}" Style="{StaticResource BodyStrongTextBlockStyle}" FontSize="14"
                            Visibility="{x:Bind Title, Converter={StaticResource StringToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
                 <TextBlock converters:MarkdownHelper.Text="{x:Bind Description, Mode=OneWay}" TextWrapping="WrapWholeWords" Opacity="0.9" FontSize="14"
                            Visibility="{x:Bind Description, Converter={StaticResource StringToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
 
                 <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{x:Bind Steps, Mode=OneWay}" Margin="0,4,0,0"
                               Visibility="{x:Bind Steps, Converter={StaticResource CollectionToVisibilityConverter}}">
                     <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                         <DataTemplate x:DataType="models:PlanStep">
                             <StackPanel Margin="0,2" Spacing="0">
                                 <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind Title, Mode=OneWay}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="13"/>
                                 <TextBlock converters:MarkdownHelper.Text="{x:Bind Description, Mode=OneWay}" FontSize="12" Opacity="0.8"
                                            Visibility="{x:Bind Description, Converter={StaticResource StringToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
                             </StackPanel>
                         </DataTemplate>
                     </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                 </ItemsControl>
             </StackPanel>
         </DataTemplate>
 
         <DataTemplate x:Key="SessionFailedTemplate" x:DataType="models:SessionFailed">
              <Border Margin="0,2" Padding="12" CornerRadius="8" Background="{ThemeResource SystemFillColorCriticalBackgroundBrush}" BorderBrush="{ThemeResource SystemFillColorCriticalBrush}" BorderThickness="1">
                 <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="12">
                     <SymbolIcon Symbol="Important" Foreground="{ThemeResource SystemFillColorCriticalBrush}"/>
                     <StackPanel>
                         <TextBlock Text="Session Failed" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{ThemeResource SystemFillColorCriticalBrush}" FontSize="14"/>
                         <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind Reason, Mode=OneWay}" TextWrapping="Wrap" FontSize="13" Opacity="0.9"
                                    Visibility="{x:Bind Reason, Converter={StaticResource StringToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
                     </StackPanel>
                 </StackPanel>
             </Border>
         </DataTemplate>
 
         <DataTemplate x:Key="BashOutputTemplate" x:DataType="models:BashOutput">
             <StackPanel Margin="0,2" Padding="8" Background="{ThemeResource SystemControlBackgroundBaseLowBrush}" CornerRadius="4">
                 <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind Command, Mode=OneWay}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="12" Opacity="0.7" Visibility="{x:Bind Command, Converter={StaticResource StringToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
                 <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind Output, Mode=OneWay}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="12" TextWrapping="Wrap" Margin="0,2"
                             Visibility="{x:Bind Output, Converter={StaticResource StringToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
                 <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind ExitCode, Mode=OneWay}" Style="{StaticResource CaptionTextBlockStyle}" HorizontalAlignment="Right"
                             Visibility="{x:Bind ExitCode, Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
             </StackPanel>
         </DataTemplate>
 
         <DataTemplate x:Key="ChangeSetTemplate" x:DataType="models:ChangeSet">
             <StackPanel Margin="0,2" Padding="8" Background="{ThemeResource SystemControlBackgroundBaseLowBrush}" CornerRadius="4">
                 <TextBlock Text="Code Changes Applied" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="13" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                 <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind Source, Mode=OneWay}" TextWrapping="Wrap" Opacity="0.7" FontSize="12" Visibility="{x:Bind Source, Converter={StaticResource StringToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
                 <TextBlock converters:MarkdownHelper.Text="{x:Bind GitPatch.SuggestedCommitMessage, Mode=OneWay}" TextWrapping="Wrap" Opacity="0.8" FontSize="12" Visibility="{x:Bind GitPatch.SuggestedCommitMessage, Converter={StaticResource StringToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
             </StackPanel>
         </DataTemplate>
 
         <DataTemplate x:Key="PullRequestTemplate" x:DataType="models:PullRequest">
-             <Border Margin="0,2" Padding="12" CornerRadius="8" Background="{ThemeResource AccentFillColorDefaultBrush}">
+             <Border Margin="0,2" Padding="12" CornerRadius="8" Background="{ThemeResource SystemControlBackgroundChromeMediumLowBrush}" BorderBrush="{ThemeResource SystemAccentColor}" BorderThickness="1">
                 <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="12">
-                    <SymbolIcon Symbol="Link" Foreground="White"/>
+                    <SymbolIcon Symbol="Link" Foreground="{ThemeResource SystemAccentColor}"/>
                     <StackPanel>
-                        <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind Title, Mode=OneWay}" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="White" FontSize="14"/>
-                        <HyperlinkButton Content="View Pull Request" NavigateUri="{x:Bind Url, Mode=OneWay}" Padding="0" Foreground="White" Opacity="0.8" FontSize="13"/>
+                        <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind Title, Mode=OneWay}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14"/>
+                        <HyperlinkButton Content="View Pull Request" NavigateUri="{x:Bind Url, Mode=OneWay}" Padding="0" FontSize="13"/>
                     </StackPanel>
                 </StackPanel>
             </Border>
         </DataTemplate>
 
         <DataTemplate x:Key="MediaTemplate" x:DataType="models:Media">
             <Image Source="{x:Bind Data, Converter={StaticResource Base64ToImageSourceConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"
                     MaxHeight="400" Stretch="Uniform" Margin="0,4"/>
         </DataTemplate>
 
         <DataTemplate x:Key="ArtifactsTemplate" x:DataType="models:Artifact">
             <StackPanel Margin="0,4,0,0">
                 <ContentControl Content="{x:Bind BashOutput}" ContentTemplate="{StaticResource BashOutputTemplate}" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Visibility="{x:Bind BashOutput, Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}}"/>
                 <ContentControl Content="{x:Bind ChangeSet}" ContentTemplate="{StaticResource ChangeSetTemplate}" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Visibility="{x:Bind ChangeSet, Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}}"/>
                 <ContentControl Content="{x:Bind PullRequest}" ContentTemplate="{StaticResource PullRequestTemplate}" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Visibility="{x:Bind PullRequest, Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}}"/>
                 <ContentControl Content="{x:Bind Media}" ContentTemplate="{StaticResource MediaTemplate}" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Visibility="{x:Bind Media, Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}}"/>
             </StackPanel>
         </DataTemplate>
 
     </Page.Resources>
 
     <Grid>
         <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
             <ColumnDefinition Width="300"/>
             <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
         </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
 
         <!-- Sessions List -->
         <Grid Grid.Column="0" BorderBrush="{ThemeResource SystemControlForegroundBaseLowBrush}" BorderThickness="0,0,1,0" Background="{ThemeResource SystemControlBackgroundChromeMediumLowBrush}">
             <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                 <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                 <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
             </Grid.RowDefinitions>
 
             <Grid Grid.Row="0" Padding="16,16,16,12">
                 <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                     <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                     <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                 </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                 <TextBlock Text="Sessions" Style="{StaticResource TitleTextBlockStyle}" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                 <Button Grid.Column="1" Command="{x:Bind ViewModel.RefreshAllDataCommand, Mode=OneWay}" ToolTipService.ToolTip="Refresh All (Clear Cache)" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0">
                     <SymbolIcon Symbol="Refresh"/>
                 </Button>
             </Grid>
 
             <ListView Grid.Row="1" ItemsSource="{x:Bind ViewModel.Sessions}"
                       SelectedItem="{x:Bind ViewModel.SelectedSession, Mode=TwoWay}"
                       ItemContainerStyle="{StaticResource SessionItemStyle}">
                 <ListView.ItemTemplate>
                     <DataTemplate x:DataType="models:Session">
                         <Grid Padding="14,10" RowSpacing="2">
                             <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                                 <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                                 <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                             </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                             <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{x:Bind Title, Mode=OneWay}" Style="{StaticResource BodyStrongTextBlockStyle}" MaxLines="1" TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis" FontSize="14"/>
                             <TextBlock Grid.Row="1" Text="{x:Bind Prompt, Mode=OneWay}" Style="{StaticResource CaptionTextBlockStyle}" MaxLines="1" TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis" Opacity="0.6" FontSize="12"/>
                         </Grid>
                     </DataTemplate>
                 </ListView.ItemTemplate>
             </ListView>
         </Grid>
 
         <!-- Session Detail / Chat -->
         <Grid Grid.Column="1">
             <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                 <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                 <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
             </Grid.RowDefinitions>
 
-            <TextBlock Text="Select a session to start"
+            <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="Select a session to start"
                        HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                        Visibility="{x:Bind ViewModel.SelectedSession, Mode=OneWay, Converter={StaticResource InvertedNullToVisibilityConverter}}"
                        Style="{StaticResource TitleTextBlockStyle}"/>
 
             <Grid Grid.Row="0" Visibility="{x:Bind ViewModel.SelectedSession, Mode=OneWay, Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}}">
                 <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                     <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                     <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                 </Grid.RowDefinitions>
 
                 <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Padding="16,12" Background="{ThemeResource SystemControlBackgroundChromeMediumLowBrush}" Spacing="8">
                     <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind ViewModel.SelectedSession.Title, Mode=OneWay}" Style="{StaticResource SubtitleTextBlockStyle}"/>
 
                     <Button Content="Approve Plan"
                             Visibility="{x:Bind ViewModel.SelectedSession.PendingPlan, Mode=OneWay, Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}}"
                             Command="{x:Bind ViewModel.ApprovePlanCommand}"
                             Style="{StaticResource AccentButtonStyle}"/>
                 </StackPanel>
 
                 <TabView Grid.Row="1" IsAddTabButtonVisible="False" TabWidthMode="Equal" Padding="8,4,8,0">
-                    <TabViewItem Header="Chat">
-                        <ListView ItemsSource="{x:Bind ViewModel.Activities}" SelectionMode="None" Padding="0,10">
+                     <TabViewItem Header="Chat">
+                         <ListView x:Name="ChatListView" ItemsSource="{x:Bind ViewModel.Activities}" SelectionMode="None" Padding="0,10">
                             <ListView.ItemContainerStyle>
                                 <Style TargetType="ListViewItem">
                                     <Setter Property="HorizontalContentAlignment" Value="Stretch"/>
                                     <Setter Property="MinHeight" Value="0"/>
                                     <Setter Property="Padding" Value="0"/>
                                     <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,1"/>
                                 </Style>
                             </ListView.ItemContainerStyle>
                             <ListView.ItemTemplate>
                                 <DataTemplate x:DataType="models:Activity">
                                     <Grid Margin="16,1" HorizontalAlignment="{x:Bind EffectiveOriginator, Converter={StaticResource OriginatorToAlignmentConverter}}"
                                           Visibility="{x:Bind HasContent, Converter={StaticResource BooleanToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}">
                                         <Border CornerRadius="12" Padding="12,10" MaxWidth="700"
                                                 Background="{x:Bind EffectiveOriginator, Converter={StaticResource OriginatorToColorConverter}}">
                                             <StackPanel Spacing="4">
                                                 <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind EffectiveOriginator}" Style="{StaticResource CaptionTextBlockStyle}" FontWeight="Bold" Opacity="0.5" Margin="0,0,0,1" FontSize="11"/>
 
                                                 <TextBlock converters:MarkdownHelper.Text="{x:Bind DisplayText, Mode=OneWay}"
                                                            TextWrapping="WrapWholeWords" FontSize="14"
                                                            Visibility="{x:Bind IsReview, Converter={StaticResource InvertedBooleanToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
 
                                                 <Expander Header="Code Review" Visibility="{x:Bind IsReview, Converter={StaticResource BooleanToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"
                                                           HorizontalAlignment="Stretch">
                                                     <StackPanel Spacing="8" Padding="4">
                                                         <TextBlock converters:MarkdownHelper.Text="{x:Bind DisplayText, Mode=OneWay}" TextWrapping="WrapWholeWords" FontSize="14"/>
                                                         <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{x:Bind Review.Comments, Mode=OneWay}" Visibility="{x:Bind Review.Comments, Converter={StaticResource CollectionToVisibilityConverter}}">
                                                             <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                                                 <DataTemplate x:DataType="models:ReviewComment">
                                                                     <StackPanel Margin="0,4" Padding="8" Background="{ThemeResource SystemControlBackgroundBaseLowBrush}" CornerRadius="4">
                                                                         <TextBlock FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Opacity="0.7">
                                                                             <Run Text="{x:Bind FilePath}"/>
                                                                             <Run Text=" : "/>
                                                                             <Run Text="{x:Bind LineNumber}"/>
                                                                         </TextBlock>
                                                                         <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind Comment}" TextWrapping="Wrap" FontSize="13" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
                                                                     </StackPanel>
                                                                 </DataTemplate>
                                                             </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                                         </ItemsControl>
                                                     </StackPanel>
                                                 </Expander>
 
                                                 <Expander Visibility="{x:Bind HasDebugInfo, Converter={StaticResource BooleanToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"
                                                           HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" Padding="4" Margin="0,4,0,0">
                                                     <Expander.Header>
                                                         <Grid HorizontalAlignment="Stretch">
                                                             <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                                                 <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                                                 <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                                                             </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                                             <TextBlock Text="Debug Info" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                                             <Button Grid.Column="1" Style="{StaticResource CaptionTextBlockStyle}"
                                                                     Padding="4" Margin="8,0,0,0" ToolTipService.ToolTip="Copy JSON"
                                                                     Command="{Binding ElementName=RootPage, Path=ViewModel.CopyToClipboardCommand}"
                                                                     CommandParameter="{x:Bind RawInfo}">
                                                                 <SymbolIcon Symbol="Copy"/>
                                                             </Button>
                                                         </Grid>
                                                     </Expander.Header>
                                                     <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind RawInfo, Mode=OneWay}" TextWrapping="Wrap" FontSize="10" FontFamily="Consolas" Opacity="0.7" IsTextSelectionEnabled="True"/>
                                                 </Expander>
 
                                                 <ContentControl Content="{x:Bind ProgressUpdated, Mode=OneWay}" ContentTemplate="{StaticResource ProgressUpdatedTemplate}" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Visibility="{x:Bind ShowProgress, Converter={StaticResource BooleanToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
 
                                                 <ContentControl Content="{x:Bind PlanGenerated.Plan, Mode=OneWay}" ContentTemplate="{StaticResource PlanGeneratedTemplate}" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Visibility="{x:Bind ShowPlan, Converter={StaticResource BooleanToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
 
                                                 <ContentControl Content="{x:Bind SessionFailed, Mode=OneWay}" ContentTemplate="{StaticResource SessionFailedTemplate}" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Visibility="{x:Bind SessionFailed, Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"/>
 
                                                 <ContentControl Content="{x:Bind BashOutput}" ContentTemplate="{StaticResource BashOutputTemplate}" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Visibility="{x:Bind BashOutput, Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}}"/>
                                                 <ContentControl Content="{x:Bind ChangeSet}" ContentTemplate="{StaticResource ChangeSetTemplate}" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Visibility="{x:Bind ChangeSet, Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}}"/>
                                                 <ContentControl Content="{x:Bind Media}" ContentTemplate="{StaticResource MediaTemplate}" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Visibility="{x:Bind Media, Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}}"/>
                                                 <ContentControl Content="{x:Bind PullRequest}" ContentTemplate="{StaticResource PullRequestTemplate}" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Visibility="{x:Bind PullRequest, Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}}"/>
 
                                                 <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{x:Bind Artifacts}" ItemTemplate="{StaticResource ArtifactsTemplate}" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Visibility="{x:Bind Artifacts, Converter={StaticResource CollectionToVisibilityConverter}}"/>
 
                                                 <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind CreateTime, Mode=OneWay}" Style="{StaticResource CaptionTextBlockStyle}" HorizontalAlignment="Right" Opacity="0.4" Margin="0,4,0,0"/>
                                             </StackPanel>
                                         </Border>
                                     </Grid>
                                 </DataTemplate>
                             </ListView.ItemTemplate>
                         </ListView>
                     </TabViewItem>
                     <TabViewItem Header="Diff" Visibility="{x:Bind ViewModel.AggregatePatch, Mode=OneWay, Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}}">
                         <Grid Background="{ThemeResource SolidBackgroundFillColorBaseBrush}">
                             <ListView ItemsSource="{x:Bind ViewModel.DiffFiles}"
                                       SelectionMode="None"
                                       BorderThickness="0"
                                       Padding="4">
                                 <ListView.ItemContainerStyle>
                                     <Style TargetType="ListViewItem">
                                         <Setter Property="HorizontalContentAlignment" Value="Stretch"/>
                                         <Setter Property="Padding" Value="0"/>
                                         <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,2"/>
                                         <Setter Property="MinHeight" Value="0"/>
                                     </Style>
                                 </ListView.ItemContainerStyle>
                                 <ListView.ItemTemplate>
                                     <DataTemplate x:DataType="vm:DiffFileViewModel">
                                         <Expander IsExpanded="{x:Bind IsExpanded, Mode=TwoWay}" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Expanding="DiffFileExpander_Expanding" Background="{ThemeResource CardBackgroundFillColorDefaultBrush}" BorderBrush="{ThemeResource CardStrokeColorDefaultBrush}" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                             <Expander.Header>
                                                 <Grid>
                                                     <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                                         <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                                         <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                                                     </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                                     <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind DisplayName}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="13" TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"/>
                                                     <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Text="{x:Bind Stats}" FontSize="11" Opacity="0.6" Margin="8,0,0,0"/>
                                                 </Grid>
                                             </Expander.Header>
                                             <ItemsRepeater ItemsSource="{x:Bind Hunks}">
                                                 <ItemsRepeater.Layout>
                                                     <StackLayout Orientation="Vertical"/>
                                                 </ItemsRepeater.Layout>
                                                 <ItemsRepeater.ItemTemplate>
                                                     <DataTemplate x:DataType="vm:DiffHunkViewModel">
                                                         <StackPanel Orientation="Vertical">
                                                             <Grid Background="{ThemeResource ControlStrongStrokeColorDefaultBrush}" Opacity="0.1" Padding="8,3">
                                                                 <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind Header}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Opacity="0.7"/>
                                                             </Grid>
                                                             <ItemsRepeater ItemsSource="{x:Bind Lines}">
                                                                 <ItemsRepeater.Layout>
                                                                     <StackLayout Orientation="Vertical"/>
                                                                 </ItemsRepeater.Layout>
                                                                 <ItemsRepeater.ItemTemplate>
                                                                     <DataTemplate x:DataType="vm:DiffLineViewModel">
                                                                         <Grid Background="{x:Bind Type, Converter={StaticResource DiffLineTypeToColorConverter}}" Padding="2,1">
                                                                             <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                                                                 <ColumnDefinition Width="50"/>
                                                                                 <ColumnDefinition Width="50"/>
                                                                                 <ColumnDefinition Width="24"/>
                                                                                 <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                                                             </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                                                             <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind OldLineNumber}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="11" Opacity="0.5" HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Center" Padding="4,0,6,0" Foreground="{ThemeResource TextFillColorSecondaryBrush}"/>
                                                                             <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Text="{x:Bind NewLineNumber}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="11" Opacity="0.5" HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Center" Padding="4,0,6,0" Foreground="{ThemeResource TextFillColorSecondaryBrush}"/>
                                                                             <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="{x:Bind Type, Converter={StaticResource DiffPrefixConverter}}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="11" FontWeight="SemiBold" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" Opacity="0.7"/>
                                                                             <TextBlock Grid.Column="3" Text="{x:Bind Content}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="11" TextWrapping="NoWrap" Foreground="{x:Bind Type, Converter={StaticResource DiffLineTypeToForegroundConverter}}" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                                                         </Grid>
                                                                     </DataTemplate>
                                                                 </ItemsRepeater.ItemTemplate>
                                                             </ItemsRepeater>
                                                         </StackPanel>
                                                     </DataTemplate>
                                                 </ItemsRepeater.ItemTemplate>
                                             </ItemsRepeater>
                                         </Expander>
                                     </DataTemplate>
                                 </ListView.ItemTemplate>
                             </ListView>
                         </Grid>
                     </TabViewItem>
                 </TabView>
             </Grid>
 
             <!-- Chat Input -->
             <Grid Grid.Row="1" Padding="16" Background="{ThemeResource SystemControlBackgroundChromeMediumLowBrush}"
                   Visibility="{x:Bind ViewModel.SelectedSession, Mode=OneWay, Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}}">
                 <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                     <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                     <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                 </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                 <TextBox Grid.Column="0" PlaceholderText="Message Jules..."
                          Text="{x:Bind ViewModel.ChatInput, Mode=TwoWay}"
                          AcceptsReturn="True" MaxHeight="120"
                          CornerRadius="8"/>
                 <Button Grid.Column="1" Margin="12,0,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                         Command="{x:Bind ViewModel.SendMessageCommand}"
                         Style="{StaticResource AccentButtonStyle}"
                         CornerRadius="8">
                     <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                         <SymbolIcon Symbol="Send"/>
                         <TextBlock Text="Send"/>
                     </StackPanel>
                 </Button>
             </Grid>
         </Grid>
     </Grid>
 </Page>

Index: Views/SettingsPage.xaml
===================================================================
--- Views/SettingsPage.xaml	
+++ Views/SettingsPage.xaml	
@@ -1,63 +1,63 @@
 <Page x:Class="JulesClient.Views.SettingsPage"
     xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
     xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
     xmlns:vm="using:JulesClient.ViewModels"
     xmlns:converters="using:JulesClient.Services"
     Background="{ThemeResource ApplicationPageBackgroundThemeBrush}">
 
     <Page.Resources>
         <converters:InvertedStringToVisibilityConverter x:Key="InvertedStringToVisibilityConverter"/>
         <converters:BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BooleanToVisibilityConverter"/>
     </Page.Resources>
 
     <ScrollViewer>
         <Grid Margin="40">
-            <StackPanel Spacing="20" MaxWidth="500" HorizontalAlignment="Left">
+            <StackPanel Spacing="20" MaxWidth="500" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                 <TextBlock Text="Settings" Style="{StaticResource TitleTextBlockStyle}"/>
 
                 <InfoBar Title="API Key Required"
                          Message="Please enter your Jules API key to start using the client."
                          IsOpen="True"
                          Severity="Informational"
                          Visibility="{x:Bind ViewModel.ApiKey, Converter={StaticResource InvertedStringToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}"
                          Margin="0,0,0,10" />
 
                 <StackPanel Spacing="8">
                     <TextBlock Text="Jules API Key" Style="{StaticResource BodyTextBlockStyle}"/>
                     <PasswordBox x:Name="ApiKeyPasswordBox"
                                 PlaceholderText="Enter your API key here"
                                 PasswordRevealMode="Peek"/>
                     <TextBlock Text="The API key is stored locally in application settings."
                                Style="{StaticResource CaptionTextBlockStyle}"
                                Foreground="{ThemeResource SystemControlPageTextBaseMediumBrush}"/>
                 </StackPanel>
 
                 <Rectangle Height="1" Fill="{ThemeResource SystemControlForegroundBaseLowBrush}" Margin="0,10"/>
 
                 <TextBlock Text="Proxy Settings" Style="{StaticResource SubtitleTextBlockStyle}"/>
 
                 <ToggleSwitch x:Name="ProxyEnabledToggle" Header="Enable SOCKS5 Proxy"
                               IsOn="{x:Bind ViewModel.ProxyEnabled, Mode=TwoWay}"/>
 
                 <StackPanel Spacing="8" Visibility="{x:Bind ProxyEnabledToggle.IsOn, Converter={StaticResource BooleanToVisibilityConverter}, Mode=OneWay}">
                     <TextBlock Text="Proxy Host" Style="{StaticResource BodyTextBlockStyle}"/>
                     <TextBox x:Name="ProxyHostTextBox" Text="{x:Bind ViewModel.ProxyHost, Mode=TwoWay}" PlaceholderText="e.g. 127.0.0.1"/>
 
                     <TextBlock Text="Proxy Port" Style="{StaticResource BodyTextBlockStyle}"/>
                     <NumberBox x:Name="ProxyPortNumberBox" Value="{x:Bind ViewModel.ProxyPort, Mode=TwoWay}" SpinButtonPlacementMode="Compact" Minimum="1" Maximum="65535"/>
 
                     <TextBlock Text="Proxy Username (Optional)" Style="{StaticResource BodyTextBlockStyle}"/>
                     <TextBox x:Name="ProxyUsernameTextBox" Text="{x:Bind ViewModel.ProxyUsername, Mode=TwoWay}"/>
 
                     <TextBlock Text="Proxy Password (Optional)" Style="{StaticResource BodyTextBlockStyle}"/>
                     <PasswordBox x:Name="ProxyPasswordBox" PasswordRevealMode="Peek"/>
                 </StackPanel>
 
                 <Button Content="Save Settings"
                         Click="OnSaveClick"
                         Margin="0,20,0,0"
                         Style="{StaticResource AccentButtonStyle}"/>
             </StackPanel>
         </Grid>
     </ScrollViewer>
 </Page>

 <Page x:Class="JulesClient.Views.SourcesPage"
     xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
     xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
     xmlns:models="using:JulesClient.Models"
     xmlns:vm="using:JulesClient.ViewModels"
     xmlns:converters="using:JulesClient.Services"
     Background="{ThemeResource ApplicationPageBackgroundThemeBrush}">
 
     <Page.Resources>
         <converters:StringToBooleanConverter x:Key="StringToBooleanConverter"/>
         <converters:InvertedNullToVisibilityConverter x:Key="InvertedNullToVisibilityConverter"/>

     <Grid Margin="40">

             <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
             <RowDefinition Height="*"/>

         <StackPanel Spacing="10" Grid.Row="0">
             <TextBlock Text="Sources" Style="{StaticResource TitleTextBlockStyle}"/>
             <TextBlock Text="Connected GitHub Repositories" Style="{StaticResource BodyTextBlockStyle}" Opacity="0.6"/>
 
             <InfoBar Title="Error" Message="{x:Bind ViewModel.ErrorMessage, Mode=OneWay}"
